name: list_products
description: Retrieve a paginated list of products tracked by Snipcart across all orders. Returns product statistics including total sales revenue, number of orders containing the product, current price, and the product URL on the merchant's website.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of products to return per page (default 20).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of products to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter for product sales data (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter for product sales data (ISO 8601 format).
